about: Report a broken, incorrect, or unexpected behaviour on the website

labels: bug
assignees: ""

<!--
  Thanks for taking the time to report this!
  Fill in as much detail as you can — it helps us reproduce and fix the issue faster.
  Delete any sections that are not relevant.
-->

## What happened?

<!-- A clear description of what went wrong. Be specific — vague reports are hard to act on. -->

## What did you expect to happen?

<!-- What should have happened instead? -->

## Steps to reproduce

<!-- Walk us through how to trigger this bug. The more specific, the better. -->

1. Go to `...` (e.g. `/past-summits`, `/schedule`)
2. Click / scroll / interact with `...`
3. See the error / broken behaviour

## Screenshots or screen recording

<!--
  For UI bugs, a screenshot or screen recording is extremely helpful.
  Drag and drop images directly into this text box, or paste a Loom / CleanShot link.
-->

## Environment

|                  |                                                       |
| ---------------- | ----------------------------------------------------- |
| **Page / Route** | e.g. `/`, `/schedule`, `/past-summits`                |
| **Browser**      | e.g. Chrome 123, Safari 17, Firefox 124               |
| **Device**       | e.g. MacBook Pro, iPhone 14, Samsung Galaxy S23       |
| **Viewport**     | e.g. Mobile (375px), Tablet (768px), Desktop (1440px) |
| **OS**           | e.g. macOS 14, Windows 11, iOS 17, Android 14         |

## Which area does this affect?

<!-- Check all that apply -->

- [ ] Layout / visual / styling
- [ ] Navigation (Navbar, routing, links)
- [ ] Content (wrong text, missing data, broken image)
- [ ] Animation / transitions
- [ ] Responsive / mobile
- [ ] Accessibility (keyboard navigation, screen reader, contrast)
- [ ] Performance (slow load, layout shift)
- [ ] Build / compilation error
- [ ] Other — describe below

## Console errors

<!--
  Open browser DevTools (F12 → Console tab), reproduce the bug, and paste any red errors here.
  If none, write "No console errors".
-->

```
paste errors here
```

## Additional context

<!-- Anything else that might help — related issues, similar pages that work fine, recent changes, etc. -->

> **For security vulnerabilities:** Do not open a public issue. Email `TODO: security@devopssummit.africa` instead. See [SECURITY.md](../../SECURITY.md).
